role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: In seeking to achieve its investment objective, the trust will hold bitcoin and will value its shares daily based on the reported MarketVectorTM Bitcoin Benchmark Rate and process all creations and redemptions in transactions with authorized participants.
